reviews.review_msg: This class felt like a joke. Midterm and Final are online and open book/internet use allowed. When students didn't understand he would just repeat the same phrase rather than trying to explain in a different way. Often seemed to forget we don't all have a masters in sound production and are total beginners. Easy credits and a few easy assignments.

He is really nice and supportive. Also inspiring and has lots of knowledge. His lectures are quite heavy but none of the slides are irrelevant to the exam so pay attention! Just listen to him and focus during the class, you're good
